summary: Linked the F-Zero car ground translation unit by changing melee/gr/grfzerocar.c from NonMatching to Matching, adjusting grfzerocar source and symbol metadata for data/sdata/sdata2 ordering. The slice includes an author note and review discussion showing uncertainty around sdata2/string ordering and use of a fake function and data symbol to force ordering.

key_files.role: Ground stage source linked for grFZeroCar; source edits include include cleanup, assert-message/string handling, sdata2 ordering fake function, local stack/pad changes, direct HSD object access, and inline scale multiplication.
Symbol metadata adjusted for grfzerocar rodata/data/sdata/sdata2 labels, sizes, and local/global symbol ownership.
Build configuration switched melee/gr/grfzerocar.c from NonMatching to Matching.

what_changed.text: symbols.txt updated grFZeroCar-related .rodata, .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 metadata, including shrinking grFZeroCar_803E0BD8 from size 0x188 to 0x168 and changing several grFZeroCar_* string/float/double entries to local @ labels.
grfzerocar.c removed placeholder/platform and several baselib/gr includes, added static string grFZeroCar_804D4598 = "archive", and changed HSD_ASSERT to HSD_ASSERTMSG using that string.
grfzerocar.c added a fakeFunc(Vec3) with f64 and Vec3 assignments explicitly annotated as for sdata2 ordering.
grFZeroCar_801CAFBC reordered locals, added six u32 pad locals, changed GET_JOBJ(gobj) to gobj->hsd_obj, and expanded multiplyScale into HSD_JObjGetScale/SetScale operations.
The decomp-dev report recorded +3016 matched/linked code bytes, +456 matched data bytes, +496 linked data bytes, and new 100% entries for grfzerocar .sdata, .sdata2, .data, and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.

smart_moves.text: The PR tied source edits to the build configuration by flipping only grfzerocar.c to Matching after reported progress for that unit.
Symbol metadata was adjusted rather than only adding C storage: local labels and local @ symbols were introduced for rodata/data/sdata/sdata2 ownership around grFZeroCar.
The author explicitly called out the sdata2-ordering hack as uncertain instead of presenting it as normal style.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data and small-data ordering can be part of linking a translation unit, but source-level ordering hacks such as fake functions are weak evidence unless backed by clear local validation and review rationale.
When linking a stage file, check both source and symbol metadata: this PR required changes in grfzerocar.c, symbols.txt, and configure.py rather than a source-only edit.
A bot progress report can support that a PR improved matching/linking metrics, but it should not be treated as full objdiff/regression proof for every individual tactic retained in the source.

naming_conventions.text: The PR retained address-style grFZeroCar_* names for recovered data symbols and used local @ labels for several small-data literals after symbol metadata changes.
Local helper name setup_car_child is descriptive and scoped static inline; fakeFunc is explicitly a matching/order tactic name, not a semantic domain name.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added fakeFunc(Vec3) to influence sdata2 ordering.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Author explicitly stated uncertainty; review discussion also flagged ordering trouble. Do not generalize as accepted style without curator review.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added six u32 pad locals in grFZeroCar_801CAFBC, likely stack-shape/register-pressure steering from the diff context.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: No inline explanation or per-symbol objdiff evidence is present in the slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Expanded multiplyScale(tra_jobj, ground_scale) into explicit HSD_JObjGetScale, component multiplication, and HSD_JObjSetScale.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Evidence shows the edit, but not why this form was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed GET_JOBJ(gobj) to direct gobj->hsd_obj access.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: No review or validation note explains whether this is preferred local style or match steering.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed pointer arithmetic for DynamicModelDesc to cast offset and archive pointer through uintptr_t/u8*.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Evidence shows matching-oriented expression churn; no broader type lesson is supported.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Asked PsiLupan and r-burns how to fix string ordering, noting attempts with inlines and pragmas did not work.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Recorded CHANGES_REQUESTED on 2026-03-27 and later APPROVED on 2026-03-28; the slice does not include explanatory approval text.

follow_up_queries: grFZeroCar_801CAFBC pad1 pad2 pad3 pad4 pad5 pad6

notes: Changed files and diffs are strong evidence for what changed.
The decomp-dev bot report provides matching/linking metric evidence for the PR slice, but no full build log, objdiff, or adjacent regression details are loaded.
The author and reviewer comments strongly evidence uncertainty around sdata2/string ordering, but do not prove the final intended best practice.
The PR was merged and later approved, but the loaded approval has no explanatory body; do not infer reviewer rationale beyond the visible comments.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Linking grfzerocar combined source, symbols, and configure changes
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2358 linked melee/gr/grfzerocar.c by changing configure.py to Matching, editing grfzerocar.c, and adjusting grFZeroCar-related symbols in .rodata/.data/.sdata/.sdata2.

accepted_candidate_records.title: sdata2/string ordering hacks need review context
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR used fakeFunc(Vec3) for sdata2 ordering and discussed string ordering difficulty; the comments show uncertainty and should be treated as cautionary evidence, not a blanket endorsement of fake functions.

source_update_candidates.title: grfzerocar.c became Matching in PR #2358
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed melee/gr/grfzerocar.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...) in PR #2358.
source_update_candidates.reason: Path-level matching status is directly evidenced by the configure.py diff.

source_update_candidates.title: grfzerocar symbol metadata adjusted for local small-data labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2358 changed several grFZeroCar sdata and sdata2 symbols from global grFZeroCar_* names to local @ labels and adjusted grFZeroCar_803E0BD8 data sizing.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol ownership and sizing changes are explicit in the diff and may be useful path facts for future grFZeroCar data work.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify fake functions used only for small-data ordering
source_update_candidates.text: Consider clarifying whether fake source functions used only to force sdata2 ordering are ever acceptable, and what evidence is required. PR #2358 used fakeFunc(Vec3) for sdata2 ordering, while the author asked for a better method and review noted unresolved string-ordering difficulty after trying inlines and pragmas.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards discourage fake storage/tactics without evidence; this merged PR provides a concrete historical case where contributors were uncertain and may justify a more explicit standard or exception policy.

rejection_notes: Do not promote fakeFunc for sdata2 ordering as an accepted global tactic from this PR alone; loaded evidence shows uncertainty and lacks detailed verifier rationale.
Do not infer that direct gobj->hsd_obj is globally preferred over GET_JOBJ; the diff only proves it was used here.
Do not infer that the added pad locals are acceptable style generally; the slice lacks explicit objdiff or adjacent regression evidence for them.
Do not claim the string-ordering issue was solved by a particular reviewer recommendation; the loaded approval has no body and the only review comment is a question.
